description: 캐릭터 레퍼런스 시트 — 다각도 포즈(front/3-4/side/back) + 표정 샘플. Nano Banana 일관성 활용.

google-ai.instruction: Generate a character reference sheet in authentic black-and-white Japanese manga style. Include front view, 3/4 view, side view, and back view on a single canvas with plain white background. Use only black ink lineart with manga screentone shading. Absolutely no color.
